profile.name: Elena Krayneva
profile.headline: Turning Marketing Data into Strategic Decisions
profile.subheadline: MSc Digital Marketing & Analytics student with a strong interest in **marketing performance**, **growth strategy**, and **data-driven decision-making**. Through applied academic projects, developed experience in campaign analysis, funnel evaluation, and KPI-based performance reporting. Particularly interested in translating marketing data into strategic insights and optimization opportunities.

bullets: Analyzed workforce datasets (headcount, onboarding, attrition, leave)
Developed KPI reports to support workforce planning and decision-making
Prepared recurring workforce KPI dashboard presentations
Compiled workforce data for talent reviews supporting succession planning
Developed structured Excel trackers to monitor contract approvals
Coordinated cross-functional workflows for 40+ contractors monthly
Proposed workflow improvements to streamline approval cycles
